remember: Students will be able to recall the plot and characters of the story 'Should Wizard Hit Mommy'.
Students will be able to remember the author's purpose and tone in the story.
understand: Students will be able to understand the theme of the story and its relevance to real-life situations.
Students will be able to comprehend the moral dilemma faced by the protagonist and its implications.
apply: Students will be able to apply the moral principles and values discussed in the story to their own lives.
Students will be able to use the story as a basis to discuss and debate ethical issues.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the character's motivations and actions in the story.
Students will be able to evaluate the author's use of literary devices and their impact on the story.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1, students will be able to respond to a variety of texts, both literary and non-literary, and demonstrate an understanding of the central idea, character and theme.
As per NCERT objective 2, students will be able to interpret and analyze texts to identify the values and attitudes presented.
board_exam_objectives: CBSE tests the student's ability to comprehend and interpret the story, and to analyze the character's actions and motivations.
CBSE evaluates the student's ability to think critically and make informed judgments about complex issues and moral dilemmas.
